title: France, une histoire d'amour
overview: After exploring the planet, Yann Arthus-Bertrand sets out to meet the people of France and photograph them. These encounters reveal sincere words that paint portraits of men and women for whom fraternity resonates more than ever with equality. This authentic, unfiltered road movie is an invitation to curiosity, but above all to living together.
